channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: MacBook Neo, AirPods Max 2, iPhone 17e, and everything else Apple announced this month
item.description: From a new iPhone to a budget-friendly MacBook, Apple announced a series of new products this week.

item.title: A Clever Software Patch Gave This Ice Satellite a Wild New Trick
item.description: A software upgrade allowed CryoSat to monitor disturbances caused by a geomagnetic storm.

item.title: Apple va vous faire attendre 2028 pour cette fonction basique sur ses iPhone abordables
item.description: À quand le 120 Hz sur les iPhone abordables de série « e » ? Un média spécialisé coréen est cette semaine porteur de bien mauvaises nouvelles en la matière, estimant que ce changement n'interviendrait pas avant l'iPhone 19e... à l'horizon 2028.

item.title: Oppo’s Find N6 might be the foldable of your dreams
item.description: Oppo is back with another high-spec foldable phone you may never see outside a tech journalist's hands. The Find N6 is its new, sub-9mm device that is headed to Asian markets and, for now, not many other places. That means no US or European availability. So why write about it? With its build quality, hardware specs and camera array, not only is it a very good phone, but it's also proof that another device maker can go toe-to-toe with Samsung’s dominance in flagship foldable phones. Hardware Image by Mat Smith for Engadget Oppo is obsessed with the foldable crease. More than me, more than most ...

item.title: Puissants, endurants et pas trop chers : voici les Poco X8 Pro et Poco X8 Pro Max
item.description: Xiaomi lance deux nouveaux smartphones : les Poco X8 Pro et Poco X8 Pro Max. Une fois n'est pas coutume, la puissance et la batterie sont à l'honneur.

item.title: Darty retire 230 € sur ce laptop Asus OLED sous Ryzen AI 7, une aubaine en pleine flambée des prix
item.description: Avec les prix des laptops qui flambent à cause de la pénurie de RAM et de stockage, trouver une bonne configuration devient un défi. Darty propose toutefois un code promo sur ce laptop Asus avec écran OLED sous Ryzen 7 qui passe de 999 euros à 769 euros.

item.title: L’enceinte de soirée Marshall Bromley 450 qui mise sur le format compact et sa polyvalence
item.description: Après l’excellente enceinte de soirée Bromley 750, la marque Marshall étend sa gamme avec la Bromley 450, dans une version réduite.

item.title: Philips’ new OLED TVs are the world’s first with Dolby Vision 2 — and I'm so excited for the follow-up to the model I called ‘best value on the market’
item.description: Philips has revealed its 2026 OLED lineup, featuring higher brightness, Dolby Vision 2 support and a new Amiblight feature!

item.title: A ‘Lord of the Rings’ Star Could Join ‘The Batman, Part II’
item.description: Plus, 'A Quiet Place, Part III' sets its cast.

item.title: Poco’s first Pro Max phone earns the name with an 8,500mAh battery
item.description: Xiaomi subsidiary Poco has launched the X8 Pro and X8 Pro Max phones, both of which feature large silicon-carbon batteries, powerful chipsets, and 256GB of storage as standard, with stronger specs on paper than the recent Pixel 10A despite costing less. Both Poco phones also feature a surprisingly subtle take on RGB lighting, with small […]

item.title: Niv-AI exits stealth to wring more power performance out of GPUs
item.description: The company raised $12 million in seed funding to measure and manage GPU power surges.

item.title: H&M wants to make clothing from CO2 using this startup’s tech
item.description: Rubi has developed an enzymatic process to turn carbon dioxide into cellulose that's ready to be spun into lyocell or viscose.

item.title: Gamma adds AI image generation tools in bid to take on Canva and Adobe
item.description: The company's new product, called Gamma Imagine, will let users employ text prompts to create brand-specific assets like interactive charts and visualizations, marketing collateral, social graphics, and infographics.

item.title: Dell XPS 16 (2026) review: Return of the king
item.description:
Last year, Dell came this close to abdicating its throne as the maker of the best premium Windows laptops when it announced it was killing off the XPS brand. Thankfully, the company regained its wits, admitted its mistake and doubled down on its flagship notebook line by revealing a full redesign for 2026 with super sleek builds, improved performance and helpful tweaks to nearly everything else we loved about its predecessors. The one blemish to Dell's crown jewel is some keyboard issues on early units. But make no mistake, the king of laptops is back.
Design and display For this revamp, De...

item.title: Prise en main du Poco X8 Pro : les finitions d’un haut de gamme à 400 euros ?
item.description: Le Poco X8 Pro offre des finitions sobres et de qualité avec un cadre en aluminium et un dos en fibre de verre. Son écran de 6,59 pouces est bien intégré, mais le smartphone est plus lourd et plus épais que certains concurrents premium. Les prix de lancement sont attractifs, variant de 309,90€ à 469,90€ selon les configurations choisies.

item.title: Industrie du jeu vidéo au Québec | « Nous nous attendons à perdre de 1000 à 1500 personnes »
item.description: Ce n’est pas seulement à cause de l’intelligence artificielle, mais le secteur des technologies, y compris les jeux vidéo, entre dans une phase de mises à pied qui pourrait s’étirer sur plusieurs années. Le Québec n’y échappera pas.

item.title: Voici le DS N°7, la nouvelle voiture électrique de la marque premium française aux 740 km d’autonomie
item.description: Voici le DS N°7, la nouvelle voiture électrique de la marque premium française. Ce cousin du Peugeot E-3008 reprend sa plateforme pour annoncer jusqu'à 740 km d'autonomie. Suffisant face aux Audi Q4 e-tron et BMW iX1 ?

item.title: Je suis monté à bord du DS N°7 : face à BMW et Audi, que vaut le SUV électrique français aux 740 km d’autonomie ?
item.description: Je suis monté à bord du DS N°7, la nouvelle voiture électrique de DS. Successeur du DS 7, meilleure vente de la marque française, le SUV joue gros et compte sur sa sophistication et son autonomie atteignant les 740 km pour poursuivre le succès. Suffisant face à BMW et Audi ? Voici notre premier avis.

item.title: Poco X8 Pro : j’ai testé le plus puissant des smartphones gamer pas chers avec des LEDs RGB
item.description: Lorsqu'il s'agit de jouer, confortablement et longtemps, le Poco X8 Pro met deux atouts de poids dans vos mains : le processeur Mediatek Dimensity 8500 Ultra et une batterie de 6500 mAh. En bonus, Xiaomi dote son smartphone d'un dispositif de rétroéclairage RGB.

item.title: CD Projekt once again declares Cyberpunk 2077 will not be getting any more playable content as it announces new PlayStation patch featuring Sony's updated PSSR tech — 'For transparency: this update will not be introducing any new in-game content'
item.description: CD Projekt Red has announced that Cyberpunk 2077 will soon receive Sony's updated PSSR (PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution) upscaling technology on PS5 Pro.

item.title: Le Bloc-notes de Windows va bientôt vous permettre d’ajouter des images
item.description: L'ajout d'images arrive bientôt dans le Bloc-notes alors qu'un premier aperçu de la fonctionnalité a fuité.

item.title: Aqara's Matter-compatible camera promises easier smart home integration
item.description: Smart home company Aqara has launched what it says is the first camera certified for Matter, the open source standard that enables interoperability across brands, like Google and Amazon. The Aqara G350 is an indoor security cam that also functions as a Zigbee and Matter hub in the Aqara Home app, which means the camera will enable you to control various devices across smart home protocols from different brands within one location. The camera itself comes with a 4K wide-angle and a 2.5K telephoto lens, providing both panoramic and closeup views. It also has 9x hybrid zoom and a pan-tilt mechani...

item.title: 'I thought this video was an April Fool's joke, but it's still March': Nvidia reveals DLSS 5 to supercharge graphics with AI — and the hate pours forth
item.description: Nvidia's reveal of DLSS 5 hasn't gone quite as planned, and that's putting it very mildly.

item.title: I Clamp Every Accessory I Can to My Desk To Avoid Clutter, and You Should, Too
item.description: It’s time to clamp down on the chaos and clear your desktop with these clever mounted accessories.

item.title: The Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer release date has been confirmed — and Marvel fans are already piecing it together ahead of time
item.description: Spider-Man 4's first teaser will be released very, very soon — and a viral Easter egg hunt is already underway to find its first footage.

item.title: 'Its most distinguishing characteristic is its humanity' one ChatGPT user says — and Sam Altman agrees as OpenAI takes steps to reduce ‘teaser-style phrasing’ in responses
item.description: Sam Altman admits ChatGPT’s real appeal isn’t its intelligence, it’s its personality, as OpenAI moves to fix tone issues after user backlash.

item.title: Black women are the fastest-growing group of entrepreneurs
item.description: Last year, Black women-owned businesses grew by 13%. By comparison, women-owned businesses grew by 4.4%. In recent years, news around women at work has been bleak—especially for Black women. Unemployment for Black women rose significantly in 2025, moving from 5.4% to a rate of 7.3% by December, as federal job cuts disproportionately hit them. And, according to U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics data, over 300,000 Black women either left the workforce or were laid off in a period of just three months last year. However, there is a silver lining: Black women are becoming the fastest-growing group o...

item.title: Galaxy Z Trifold : Samsung abandonne déjà son smartphone pliant à 3 000 dollars
item.description: Samsung met fin à la commercialisation de son impressionnant smartphone à trois volets. Proposé à près de trois mille dollars, cet appareil hors norme n'aura finalement été qu'une brillante démonstration technologique sans véritable avenir commercial.

item.title: Smart Glasses Have Privacy Advocates Scrambling
item.description: It's getting to the point of state-level legislation.

item.title: À peine lancée, la première serrure connectée de Xiaomi voit déjà son prix chuter
item.description: Avec sa nouvelle serrure connectée, Xiaomi s’attaque à un nouveau terrain de jeu : la maison intelligente. Simple à installer, bardée de fonctionnalités et proposée à un tarif déjà agressif, elle se trouve encore plus accessible avec cette remise de 10 %.

item.title: Looking for cheap Philips Hue lights? I'm a home tech editor, and these are my 5 top picks from the Spring Sale
item.description: There are huge price cuts on almost all Philips Hue lights and accessories in the official store, with deals that smash Amazon's current offerings.

item.title: How to make your smartphone last longer
item.description: Replacing a smartphone every two years is partially why billions of phones go into landfills each year. If stacked flat atop one another, that many handsets would reach farther than the ISS. But we’ve become accustomed to that 24-month time frame because wireless carriers often push an upgrade on biennial contracts, and many smaller phone makers only offer software support for two years. But now, with longer software commitments from major manufacturers, along with growing right-to-repair legislation, many newer phones can stay in our pockets for closer to seven trips around the sun. Here’s ho...

item.title: Skylight’s Calendar 2 Review: Its Best Digital Calendar Yet
item.description: Skylight’s popular digital calendar gets its Goldilocks size. But like with the Calendar Max before it, you have to prepare your family for a full conversion to keep it useful.

item.title: Oppo Find N6, la preuve qu’Apple va (enfin) lancer l’iPhone pliant
item.description: L'Oppo Find N6 est le premier smartphone pliant presque sans pliure grâce à une nouvelle technologie de charnière et d'impression 3D. Cette avancée technique pourrait inciter d'autres marques, dont Apple, à développer des smartphones pliants similaires.

item.title: Prise en main Oppo Find N6 : le smartphone pliant dont rêvent Samsung et Apple
item.description: L'Oppo Find N6 révolutionne le smartphone pliant avec une pliure quasiment imperceptible grâce à une nouvelle charnière en titane et une technologie d'impression 3D. Nous avons pu le prendre en main en amont de sa commercialisation mondiale.

item.title: ‘Doctor Who’ Has Never Met an Uncertain Time It Can’t Throw David Tennant At
item.description: The actor will return (as the Tenth Doctor, to be specific) in new audio adventures from Big Finish Productions.

item.title: Oppo’s nearly creaseless foldable isn’t launching in Europe after all
item.description: Oppo has launched its "zero-feel crease" foldable, the Find N6, but while we knew it was unlikely to launch in the US, it's a shame to discover that the promised "global" launch is also leaving Europe out in the cold. Instead, the Find N6 will go on sale from March 20th across what the company […]

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch March Madness 2026 for FREE
item.description: We uncovered a sneaky way to watch March Madness for FREE – from anywhere in the world, without coughing up for an expensive streaming subscription.

item.title: Squarespace unveils Balance platform to make running an SMB 'easier, more efficient, and more cost-effective'
item.description: Squarespace has launched a new bank-like tool to give SMBs access to interest-like payments and Visa spending cards.

item.title: Marshall adds a junior-sized party speaker to its lineup
item.description: Marshall is launching a smaller companion for its highly rated Bromley 750 party speaker. The new Bromley 450 retains the larger model’s guitar-amp motif but comes in a petite, less expensive package.The Bromley 450 carries over its larger sibling’s 360-degree audio trickery. Like equivalents from other companies, Marshall’s “True Stereophonic 360-degree sound” fools your brain into perceiving more directionality than its form factor allows. Lighting effects (“inspired by ‘70s stage shows”) also carry over from the larger model. However, this new speaker lacks the “sound character” control fou...

item.title: Marshall launches its new lightweight party speaker, the Bromley 450
item.description: A new party speaker from Marshall is coming. The Bromley 450 is the smaller counterpart to the Bromley 750. The new Bluetooth speaker arrives March 31, retailing for $799.99.

item.title: Oppo Find N6 : le pliable sans pliure qui tourne le dos à la France
item.description: Oppo lance son Find N6, l'un des smartphones pliables les plus fins du monde, mais qui boude malheureusement l'Hexagone.

item.title: Krispy Kreme is giving away free doughnuts for St. Patrick’s Day today. But you have to wear the right thing
item.description: You don’t have to be Irish to take advantage of the popular chain’s freebie offer on Tuesday, March 17. Here’s what to know. The doughnut chain that hardly needs an excuse to give away free doughnuts is, you guessed it, giving away more free doughnuts today.

item.title: Spotify could be coming to your smart glasses with a fun tool that’s perfect for solo karaoke
item.description: Spotify could be developing support for smart glasses — here's what it could entail when Spotify enters the world of XR.

item.title: Samsung discontinues its Galaxy Z TriFold after just three months
item.description: Samsung is preparing to axe its first three-panel foldable phone less than three months after launching the device in the US. Sales of the $2,899 Galaxy Z TriFold will first be wound down in Korea and then discontinued in the US once remaining inventory has been cleared, an unnamed Samsung spokesperson told Bloomberg. This follows […]

item.title: The top 10 most-followed Instagram accounts
item.description: The most-followed Instagram accounts right now

item.title: The latest Nintendo Switch 2 update takes handheld mode to the next level — I've tested it and the results are 'incredible'
item.description: The latest Switch 2 system update has added a new feature that dramatically improves the visuals in original Switch games.

item.title: Top 10 YouTube channels with the most subscribers
item.description: The most-subscribed YouTube channels dominating the platform right now

item.title: Top Twitch streamers by follower count: See the list.
item.description: These are the top 10 most-followed Twitch accounts right now.

item.title: Mauvaise nouvelle pour les futurs smartphones Samsung Galaxy
item.description: Pour contrer l'explosion des prix de certains composants, la division mobile de Samsung va devoir réduire les coûts.

item.title: The content creators with the most TikTok followers - see the top 10.
item.description: The most-followed TikTok creators right now

item.title: Netflix drops BTS documentary trailer and its one for the fans
item.description: Netflix has released the trailer for documentary "BTS: The Return" — and it's for ARMY.

item.title: Pendant que Stellantis relance le diesel, Renault dégaine une électrique à 1 400 km d’autonomie
item.description: Renault vient de signer un retour en arrière sur le 100 % électrique. Mais face à Stellantis qui relance le diesel et les gros moteurs V8 essence, la décision de Renault avec des électriques à 1 400 km d'autonomie semble plus sage et davantage dans l'air du temps.

item.title: The best robot vacuum deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale: Dreame, Shark, and Eufy
item.description: Shop the best early robot vacuum deals from top brands during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Save onDreame, Shark, and Eufy.

item.title: Amazon adds 1-hour and 3-hour delivery options in the US
item.description: Amazon Prime subscribers will be charged $9.99 for one-hour delivery and $4.99 for three-hour delivery. If you don't have a Prime subscription, you'll pay $19.99 for one-hour delivery and $14.99 for three-hour delivery.

item.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on March 17
item.description: See the Moon phase expected for March 17, 2026 as well as when the next Full Moon is expected.

item.title: Amazons Big Spring Sale is back: The best deals already live on Apple, robot vacuums, headphones, and more
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is back from March 25 to 31. Shop the best early deals on Apple, headphones, TVs, and more.

item.title: La première Google Pixel Watch passe pour la première fois à 134 €, une montre Wear OS avec écran AMOLED et suivi GPS au top
item.description: Après avoir distribué Wear OS à tout le monde, Google lançait sa première montre connectée Pixel Watch en 2022 pour 379 euros. Et aujourd'hui, elle tombe à 134,80 euros sur Amazon.
